title: Issuance; form
doc_html:
TITLE III

PRODUCTION OF EVIDENCE

CHAPTER 1. SUBPOENAS

Art. 1351. Issuance; form

           The clerk of the court wherein the action is pending, at the request of the court or a party, shall issue subpoenas for the attendance of witnesses at hearings or trials. A subpoena shall issue under the seal of the court. It shall state the name of the court and the title of the action and shall command the attendance of the witness at a time and place specified, until discharged.

Acts 2025, No. 250, §3.
doc_text:
TITLE III
PRODUCTION OF EVIDENCE
CHAPTER 1.  SUBPOENAS
Art. 1351.  Issuance; form
The clerk of the court wherein the action is pending, at the request of the
court or a party, shall issue subpoenas for the attendance of witnesses at hearings or
trials.  A subpoena shall issue under the seal of the court.  It shall state the name of
the court and the title of the action and shall command the attendance of the witness
at a time and place specified, until discharged.
Acts 2025, No. 250, §3.
